TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Michael_D_Higgins, title = Michael_D_Higgins, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Michael_D_Higgins} }

S.FORM: Michael D. Higgins ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 4, Michael D. Higgins, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1941) mrhuw Ireland ta' misuw hya' ga Michael D. Higgins, aring ryax tay 11 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 2011 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Michael D. Higgins ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 4, Michael D. Higgins, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1941) mrhuw Ireland ta' misuw hya' ga Michael D. Higgins, aring ryax tay 11 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 2011 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: miʦ~ʨħael *. ħiɣɣins~ɕ rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, miʦ~ʨħael *. ħiɣɣins~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw irelan* taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa miʦ~ʨħael *. ħiɣɣins~ɕ, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
